title: Hotel chain alerts its clients about “special offer” telephone scam
summary: A concerned individual issued a formal complaint because she suspected that a hotel chain linked her IP address with her phone number after she received a promotional phone call. Our Office was informed by the hotel’s representative that the company does not engage in promotional calls, hence the phone call was fraudulent by an unrelated...
dedupKey: hotel chain alerts its clients about special offer telephone scam|2015-03-12
